scripts.check: npm run check:js && npm run check:data && npm run check:server
scripts.check:full: npm run check && npm run check:browser && npm run check:animations
scripts.check:js: node --check assets/app.js && node --check assets/learning-sync.js && node --check assets/learning-progress.js && node --check assets/learning-blocks.js && node --check assets/learning-cycle.js && node --check assets/problem-content.js && node --check assets/problem-favorites.js && node --check assets/problem-note-interactions.js && node --check assets/step-conversation.js && node --check assets/scene-registry.js && node --check assets/json-animation-runtime.js && node --check assets/physics-audio.js && node --check assets/json-animation-scenes.js && node --check assets/circular-daily-scenes.js && node --check assets/scenes/*.js && node --check scripts/test_browser_regression.mjs && node --check scripts/test_animation_smoke.mjs
scripts.check:data: python3 -B scripts/backfill_taxonomy.py && python3 -B scripts/backfill_animation_metadata.py && python3 -B scripts/backfill_learning_content.py && python3 -B scripts/validate_problems.py && python3 -B scripts/build_learning_progress.py --check
